all_facts.fact: The Arena's most notorious event, the 'BloodForge Tournament,' occurs once every 1,000 blocks, pitting the fiercest warriors against each other in a gauntlet of deadly challenges, with the winner earning the title of 'Forge Lord' and a unique NFT weapon that holds power both in-game and in the lore of Block Topia.

Hidden within the Arena's code is the 'Cryptic Dungeon,' a secret level accessible only to players who solve ancient blockchain puzzles, where they face spectral versions of fallen heroes and can claim relics that alter the very rules of combat if brought into the main game.

The game’s lore hints at a dark prophecy tied to the Arena, suggesting that a champion will one day rise to unite all factions under a single banner, a prediction that has sparked both hope and fear among the denizens of the GraffPUNKS universe.
